top_signals.title: Anthropic asked for regulation. Washington went much further
top_signals.summary: Anthropic has long been supportive of AI regulation, but the Trump administration is coming down particularly hard on the AI company.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
